pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py
Confirmed via setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PsychoPy experiment from scratch. The agent is expected to save the experiment file strictly to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/go_nogo_experiment.psyexp and the conditions CSV file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/go_nogo_conditions.csv. These paths are verified by the setup and evaluation scripts.
